tool_plan.objective: Read the Google Chrome (and other Chromium-based browsers) cache folder on Windows and display a list of cached files with associated metadata; allow exporting the list and extracting cached files.

required_actions.name: browser.launch
required_actions.why: Generate Chromium cache entries that ChromeCacheView can enumerate.

required_actions.name: browser.goto
required_actions.why: Create cached resources (URLs/content types) in the browser cache for listing/export.

required_actions.name: browser.close
required_actions.why: Flush/settle cache files on disk so cache_data is stable for parsing and export.

completion.detail: Complete when chromium.cache.cache_data is present after browser.close, indicating on-disk Chromium cache data exists for ChromeCacheView to enumerate/export.

tool_plan.action_intent_guidance: Action Flow: (1) browser.launch a Chromium-based browser profile that will write to a local cache (default profile is fine). (2) browser.goto a few distinct, stable, publicly reachable pages that natu

_provenance.notes: 3-stage TMI: IR -> bounded mapping -> tool_plan (leaf artifact keys only; with JSON repairs)
